name: Turkey-Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped fresh parsley (2 tbsp dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a soup pot or slow cooker.
2. Cook over low heat in the slow cooker for 6 hours, or simmer on the stove for 1 hour, until carrots are tender and barley is soft.
Title: Turkey-Barley Soup
Combine all ingredients in a soup pot or slow cooker. Cook over low heat for 6 hours in the slow cooker, or simmer on the stove for 1 hour until carrots are tender and barley is soft.
